options.name: --name
options.description:
Provide a name for the Environment.
If not set, the name will be
generated automatically using the
source branch (or local changes) and
current time

options.name: --input
options.description:
The Blueprints inputs can be provided
as a key=value pair. For example: -i
key1=value1 -i key2=value2

options.name: --branch
options.description:
Run the Blueprint version from a
remote Git branch

options.name: --commit
options.description:
Specify a specific Commit ID. This is
used in order to run a environment
from a specific Blueprint historic
version. If this parameter is used,
the Branch parameter must also be
specified

options.name: --timeout
options.description:
30         Set how long (default timeout is 30
minutes) to block and wait before
releasingcontrol back to shell
prompt. If timeout is reached before
the desired statusthe wait loop will
be interrupted

options.name: --wait
options.description:
Block shell prompt and wait for the
Environment to be Active while the
timeout is not reached.Default
timeout is 30 minutes.The default
timeout can be changed using the
'timeout' flag

arguments.name: BLUEPRINT_NAME
arguments.description: The bluerpint name to run an envrironment from

commands.name: specified
commands.description:
--timeout <MINUTES>     30         Set how long (default timeout is 30
minutes) to block and wait before
releasingcontrol back to shell
prompt. If timeout is reached before
the desired statusthe wait loop will
be interrupted
-w, --wait                             Block shell prompt and wait for the
Environment to be Active while the
timeout is not reached.Default
timeout is 30 minutes.The default
timeout can be changed using the
'timeout' flag
